title: BIBS Dummy Box with Elastic Band Steriliser Box for Dummies 100% BPA Free Material Blossom
features: BIBS pacifier box is a multiple-functional product, that not only can be used for storing pacifiers when you are on the go but also as a sterilizer box for microwave sterilization.

Add two spoonsful of water to the pacifier box and place the pacifier in. Put the box in the microwave for approx. 60 seconds at max. 800W. We recommend only sterilizing silicone pacifiers in the microwave.
Can hold up to three BIBS pacifiers. Comes with a pacifier insert that can hold one single pacifier
Made of 100% safe and food-grade material
description: Product Description BIBS Pacifier box Say goodbye to lost or dirty pacifiers with our pacifier cases Keep pacifiers safe Say goodbye to lost or dirty pacifiers and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with keeping your baby's pacifiers safe. ​ Made of safe material All cases are made of safe material and food-grade material . 100% BPA, PVC, and phthalates free. Easy fastening strap All our pacifier boxes feature straps to hang the products on a pram, stroller, changing bag, or cot. Multi-functional BIBS Pacifier Box is a multiple-functional product , that can be used for storing pacifiers when you are on the go but also as a sterilizer box . Store your baby's pacifiers Pacifier box Modern parents are constantly going somewhere – to the grandparents, the park, daycare, grocery shopping, you name it… and how many times are our small ones dropping and losing their pacifiers? ​ ​That’s why our pacifier cases are essential for keeping pacifiers safe . They provide a convenient and hygienic solution for parents to store and transport their baby's pacifiers , without losing them. The video showcases the product in use. specifications_table.Care Instructions: ‎Take out the insert. Add two spoonsful of water to the pacifier box and place the pacifier in. Put the box in the microwave for approx. 60 seconds at max. 800W. Temperatures should not exceed 100°C.
